name: dependency-refs
description: Other RFCs or changes that this RFC depends on or must be co-applied with.

aiGuidance.purpose: Other RFCs or changes that this RFC depends on or must be co-applied with.
aiGuidance.extraction: Use RFC numbers (e.g. 'RFC-002') or names. If this RFC cannot be applied without another, state that explicitly. Co-application dependencies must both be accepted to be meaningful.
